case_patterns.name: Mandatory AI Image Filtering as Editable Default Test
case_patterns.type: public policy / platform governance / technical filtering default
case_patterns.sdelta_question: Does the filtering default remain governable?

audit_conditions.Ed: filtering default is editable and contestable
audit_conditions.Ad: authority over design, review, appeal, technical evaluation, and audit is distributed
audit_conditions.Wr: rollback remains materially feasible after false positives or false negatives
audit_conditions.Ce: public-interest, journalistic, educational, evidence-preservation, artistic, or contextual exceptions can re-enter review

case_patterns.boundary: Do not use this case pattern as a blanket claim that filtering is censorship or legitimacy.
